race.comment: FARNANHEIT (2) has switched from a top Victorian stable on a 60-day return. REDS EXPRESS (7) resumes, and the ex-Victorian has her first full preparation for the Clarke yard. Wasn't beaten far here when last seen, and his VIC provincial form certainly stacks up. STILL THE MOON (12) debuts at home and just missed in a recent Canberra trial. Looks to have good ability and jumps from the inside barrier with Budler engaged. A bold run is on the cards. SYMBOL OF STATE (10) is a former Victorian who has switched to the local Joe Cleary stable on a 39-day return. Had been well supported but disappointed in both race starts, but has the blinkers on for the first time and may be enjoying the new surroundings. KOO KOO ACHOO (5) is up from Kembla Grange for her debut with JVO booked. Expect him to be sharper than the trial finishes suggest.
